name: The Harem App
description:
After dropping your cell phone in the toilet, you bought a refurb from a weird little electronics store in the warrens of downtown Manhattan. The phone came with an app called Harem and, when you point the camera at a woman, a button appears that says 'Add to Harem.'

It's probably some hentai game, right?

Scenario 1: You go to a party where you can try out 'training' the Harem app.

Scenario 2: You're at home, considering the app, trying to figure it out.

(version 2.3.12 - testing through release.)

TW - mind control, possible NTR, loss of agency, dubcon.
creator: The Real Tom Frost
